positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric floral arrangement featuring monstera leaves, eucalyptus, and intricate stylized mandalas. The overall composition should have clean silhouettes and strong black line work against a white or very light cream background. Use a limited color palette of forest green, deep indigo blue, and sepia beige. The style should be inspired by Art Deco symmetry, Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print linework, and modern graphic design. Central, high contrast, vector-art quality, isolated on white.
negative: low contrast, blur, smudge, grainy, sketch, text, words, watermark, logo, writing, artifact, noise, messy, asymmetrical, bad composition, muted colors, poor anatomy, jpeg artifacts
